content.delta:
The project **alpha-backend** is currently active and was last updated on March 15, 2026. It has 12 members and currently has 3 security advisories pending review.

A web search for security advisories specifically related to "alpha-backend" did not return any public documentation or external reports, suggesting these advisories may be internal to your organization or the project is not widely indexed under that specific name. You should check your internal security dashboard or project management system to review the details of the 3 pending advisories.
